title: centaurium × ubsdellii
intro: Centaurium × ubsdellii, also known as Centaury, is a hybrid plant species derived from the cross between Centaurium erythraea and Centaurium sommerfelli. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and promoting wound healing due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Centaurium × ubsdellii include relief from stomach pain, diarrhea, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. Centaurium × ubsdellii can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal purposes.
